task_objective: Consolidate and merge redundant sudo fix, refined logging, and auto-push build process to main.
design_decisions: Implemented UID-based 'Smart Sudo' to prevent redundant sudo calls when running as the target user (UID 1000).
Refined logging to use DEBUG level and filtered environment keys (PATH, HOME, DECKY_*, etc.) to reduce noise.
Disabled log propagation in Decky Loader environment to eliminate duplicate log entries.
Updated the build process (post_commit.sh) to automatically scp the plugin zip to the Steam Deck (10.168.168.20).
Added a ping check to the build process to avoid hangs when the Deck is unreachable.
results: All improvements merged to main. Redundant sudo calls are eliminated, logs are concise and single-entry, and the build-to-device workflow is automated.
